experience.title: Corporate Associate
responsibilities: Drafted and reviewed corporate agreements for various clients.
Assisted in corporate governance matters involving board meetings and compliance.
Supported senior attorneys in mergers and acquisitions by conducting due diligence.
Collaborated with clients to negotiate contracts and resolve disputes.

experience.title: Legal Intern
responsibilities: Conducted legal research on corporate compliance regulations.
Prepared summaries of case law related to corporate governance.
Assisted in client management and maintained case files.

response.summary: Dedicated corporate lawyer with experience in drafting agreements and corporate governance. Skilled in contract negotiation and supporting M&A processes.
